subcodes.first_line: For every one who turneth unto God, and for every believer, man or woman, hath been sent down that which is most precious in the sight of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از برای هر مقبل و مقبله و مومن و مومنه نازل شد آنچه اعز است عند الله از آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @presence of; reunion with God, @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @call to action
